MS Excel and Word assessment test contains topics like Tables, Charts, Shapes, Character Formatting, Pivot Chart, and many more. This assessment helps recruiters reduce hiring time by 80%

## Microsoft Word and Excel Assessment Test

Microsoft Excel is one of the most versatile Microsoft Office products which is nearly used by every professional in the world. Excel is a spreadsheet program included in Microsoft Office suite of applications which provides with the values arranged in rows and columns that can be changed mathematically using both basic and complex arithmetic operations and functions.

Another commonly used Microsoft Office product is Microsoft Word which is used to write reports, important business letters, and other correspondence. Many entry-level or administration job roles, strong knowledge of word and excel is required.

MS Word and Excel test for employment helps recruiters and hiring managers to assess MS Excel and Word skills. The Microsoft Word and Excel test is designed and validated by experienced Subject Matter Experts (SME) to evaluate MS Excel as well as MS Word skills of the candidate as per the industry standards.

Blue hollow ring shape above and to the left of a solid orange circle on a white background.

How it works

### Test Summary

Our Microsoft Word and Excel assessment test ensure the recruiters to hire best applicants, who have good knowledge of formatting, file management, printing, editing, graphics, formulas, functions, and tools in word and excel. The score reports give you a detailed analysis of every candidate that provides better insights on who could be the best fit for your organization.

Microsoft Word and Excel proficiency tests may contain MCQs (Multiple Choice Questions), MAQs (Multiple Answer Questions), Fill in the Blanks, Descriptive, Whiteboard Questions, Audio/Video Questions, AI-LogicBox, Job-based Simulations, True or False Questions, etc

Useful for hiring 

* Office Administrative Professionals
* Microsoft Office Specialists

### Tables, Charts & Shapes

Our Microsoft Excel and Word test evaluates candidates' ability to use Tables, Charts & Shapes in Microsoft Word

### Character Formatting

This assessment helps recruiters check candidates' knowledge of using character formatting

Shuffle

### Pivot Chart

MS Word and Excel test can be used by employers to quantify candidates' knowledge of using Pivot chart in Excel

Shuffle

### VLOOKUP function

Microsoft Excel & Word proficiency test helps recruiters to assess candidates' ability to use VLOOKUP function to find things in a table or a range by row

Shuffle

### Format Painter

This assessment checks candidates' knowledge of using format painter in Word & Excel

Shuffle

### Header & Footer

Microsoft Word and Excel assessment test evaluate candidates' ability to create headers and footers in Word
